description: Create an 'Alien' variant of the character in the sample scene (/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz) by changing the skin color from the original pink/flesh tone to bright Teal (RGB: 0, 255, 255). Ensure the character's black outlines remain black. The final output should be at least 10 frames of the recolored animation rendered as PNG files to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/alien_variant/.
